text: Apple reports record Q4 revenue of $89.5 billion, beating analyst expectations by 6%
Federal Reserve signals potential rate hike amid persistent inflation concerns
Tesla shares plunge 12% after disappointing delivery numbers fall short of forecasts
Microsoft announces $10 billion investment in OpenAI partnership expansion
Goldman Sachs to lay off 3,200 employees in largest workforce reduction since 2008
U.S. unemployment rate holds steady at 3.7% in November jobs report
Amazon Web Services revenue grows 29% year-over-year, driving cloud division profits
SEC launches investigation into cryptocurrency exchange over alleged market manipulation
JPMorgan Chase raises quarterly dividend to $1.05 per share, up from $1.00
Boeing announces board meeting to discuss quarterly earnings scheduled for next Wednesday
